title: Owner UI playability blocker audit and remediation planning
summary: Record the post-M8 owner UI/playability/localization blockers, consult the art thread, audit the current UI and generate a reviewed remediation DAG without entering public release work.
acceptance: Records OWNER-AMENDMENT-2026-06-28-POST-M8-UI-PLAYABILITY-REMEDIATION as a hard release-readiness blocker, not a style suggestion
Confirms current Roadmap authority, Web demo-only verdict, Windows unsigned controlled external-test verdict and all public release owner gates remain unchanged
Contacts the owner-provided art thread or records exactly why consultation remains pending without blocking technical remediation
Audits the current UI, interaction, camera, localization and playability state against the owner screenshots and current code

Creates a reviewed Post-M8 UI / Playability Remediation DAG with non-public-release task packets for UI, i18n, responsive, world selection, camera control, minimum playable command, visual regression, verdict update and closeout
Does not implement product UI changes beyond control-plane reports and task packets in this planning task

history.details: Created from owner post-M8 UI/playability remediation prompt.

Recorded owner post-M8 UI/playability blockers, sent art-thread consultation, audited current UI/interactions/i18n at planning depth, created WM-0130 through WM-0142 remediation DAG, and passed handoff/task/diff/quality gates without changing product code or owner-gated release verdicts.

verified: No blocking findings. Verified owner post-M8 UI/playability blocker is recorded as a hard release-readiness blocker; M6/M7/M8, Web demo-only, Windows unsigned controlled-test, and owner-gated public release/store/signing/telemetry/accounts/paid-service/public-save boundaries are preserved; art consultation is advisory; WM-0130..WM-0142 cover required remediation lanes and remain unclaimed proposed tasks; code audit honestly records product-gate read-model and Noop/Echo command risks; required read-only checks passed.
Integrated verified post-M8 UI/playability remediation planning DAG after handoff, taskctl, diff and corepack pnpm quality gates passed.

forbiddenPaths: product UI implementation outside downstream remediation tasks
telemetry, accounts, hosted feedback or paid services
changing Web demo-only or Windows controlled-test verdicts without owner approval

review.summary: No blocking findings. Verified owner post-M8 UI/playability blocker is recorded as a hard release-readiness blocker; M6/M7/M8, Web demo-only, Windows unsigned controlled-test, and owner-gated public release/store/signing/telemetry/accounts/paid-service/public-save boundaries are preserved; art consultation is advisory; WM-0130..WM-0142 cover required remediation lanes and remain unclaimed proposed tasks; code audit honestly records product-gate read-model and Noop/Echo command risks; required read-only checks passed.

integration.summary: Integrated verified post-M8 UI/playability remediation planning DAG after handoff, taskctl, diff and corepack pnpm quality gates passed.
